etymology.interpretation: The character combines the phonetic element η”«(η”«) (fΗ”, "garden"), suggesting the original context of distributing crops, with the semantic component ε―Έ(ε―Έ) (cΓΉn, "hand"), reinforcing the idea of distributing or handling goods, leading to the broad meaning of 'elaborating'.
